---
title: "PREVENT-AD Baseline Linear Regression"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(ggpubr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

clinical_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_clinical_imp_raw.rds"))
lifestyle_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_lifestyle_imp_raw.rds"))
apoe <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_apoe.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_biomarkers.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_dat.rds"))
cogd_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_cogd_scored_dat.rds"))
libra_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_OUTPUT_PATHS$data$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_libra_scored_dat.rds"))
fhx <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_fhx_dat.rds"))

baseline_dat <- fhx %>%
  left_join((clinical_raw %>%
               select(CONP_ID, Sex, Education_years)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((biomarkers %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice(1)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(apoe, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((cogd_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_cogd=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((libra_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_libra2=score)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(CONP_ID, score_cogd, score_libra2, Candidate_Age, Sex,
         Education_years, ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex, 
         NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex, apoe_category) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ptau181_simoa_UGOT, ptau217_simoa_UGOT, AB_ratio_simoa_4plex,
             NFL_simoa_4plex, GFAP_simoa_4plex),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  )
```
